name: ultraprompt
description: Ultraprompt V8 cognitive control-plane plugin for Claude Code and Codex: 48 skills, 29 agents, 42 MCP tools, 30 commands, typed local memory, safe dream jobs, governed learning, workflow pathfinding, capability graph, live Mission Control dashboard, evidence-led release gates, and dual-runtime install.
compatibility_notes: V8.0.0 preserves the native Codex manifest. Installer does not copy the Claude manifest over Codex metadata.
Hooks may require feature detection depending on Codex runtime version.
Subagents supported via Task tool; agent definitions shared with Claude runtime.
Cognitive memory, dreams, learning, and pathfinding are local-first and governed by release gates.
